providers.citationLabel: EPA Indoor Radon Zones & Air Quality Surveys
providers.mandatoryRule: ▸ Highlight radon hazard classes, county zone ratings, and action levels in **BOLD** (e.g. **Zone 1 High Radon Potential**, **EPA Action Level 4.0 pCi/L**, **EPA Indoor Air Guide Passed**)
providers.detectIntent: (query) => { return /radon zone|epa indoor radon|county radon hazard|indoor air quality radon/i.test(query); }
providers.sampleTable:
| Monitored Metric | Target Filer | Standard Level | Regulatory Status |
|------------------|--------------|----------------|-------------------|
| EPA Indoor Radon Zones & Air Quality Surveys Spec | Altis Corp | EPA_RADON_ZONES High | EPA Indoor Air Guide Passed |

providers.citationLabel: EIA Nuclear Power Generation & Fuel Inventories
providers.mandatoryRule: ▸ Highlight nuclear reactor capacity factors, outage logs, and net generation in **BOLD** (e.g. **98.5% Capacity Factor**, **1,245 Megawatts Nuclear Output**, **EIA Active Reactor Monitor**)
providers.detectIntent: (query) => { return /nuclear power generation|eia reactor status|nuclear fuel capacity|reactor outage logs/i.test(query); }
providers.sampleTable:
| Monitored Metric | Target Filer | Standard Level | Regulatory Status |
|------------------|--------------|----------------|-------------------|
| EIA Nuclear Power Generation & Fuel Inventories Spec | Altis Corp | EIA_NUCLEAR_GENERATION High | EIA Active Reactor Monitor |

providers.mandatoryRule: ▸ Cite Section 8 voucher limits, public housing funding, and PHA standing in **BOLD** (e.g. **Section 8 Voucher Allocation**, **$12,450 Monthly PHA Payout**, **HUD High Performer Rating**)
providers.detectIntent: (query) => { return /section 8 vouchers|hud rental assistance|public housing authority funding|housing choice voucher allocations/i.test(query); }

providers.mandatoryRule: ▸ Highlight beneficial owner holdings, active equity stake percentages, and filing dates in **BOLD** (e.g. **5.8% Active Equity Stake**, **Schedule 13D Ownership Filer**, **SEC Beneficial Owner Registry**)
